'''warava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadsign|roadsign]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadsign|roadsign]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| warava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wærævæth|wærævæth]] || [[word:wærævæj|wærævæj]] || [[word:wærævæsh|wærævæsh]] || [[word:wærævæ|wærævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wararavath|wararavath]] || [[word:wararavaj|wararavaj]] || [[word:wararavash|wararavash]] || [[word:wararava|wararava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:waravath|waravath]] || [[word:waravaj|waravaj]] || [[word:waravash|waravash]] || [[word:warava|warava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:warafvath|warafvath]] || [[word:warafvaj|warafvaj]] || [[word:warafvash|warafvash]] || [[word:warafvaf|warafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:waravatha|waravatha]] || [[word:waravaja|waravaja]] || [[word:waravasha|waravasha]] || [[word:waravaka|waravaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:waravath|waravath]] || [[word:waravaj|waravaj]] || [[word:waravash|waravash]] || [[word:warava|warava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:waravathal|waravathal]] || [[word:waravajal|waravajal]] || [[word:waravashal|waravashal]] || [[word:waravakal|waravakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:waravathatha|waravathatha]] || [[word:waravajaja|waravajaja]] || [[word:waravashasha|waravashasha]] || [[word:waravaka|waravaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:waravathan|waravathan]] || [[word:waravajan|waravajan]] || [[word:waravashan|waravashan]] || [[word:waravakan|waravakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:waravathaoro|waravathaoro]] || [[word:waravajaoro|waravajaoro]] || [[word:waravashaoro|waravashaoro]] || [[word:waravakaoro|waravakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
